---
title: "Contact"
body-classes: page-title
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-header}

::: {.header-text}

::: {.header-title}
CONTACT
:::

::: {.header-subtitle}
Get in touch with the CALM Lab.
:::

:::

:::

::: {.section-shell}

::: {.grid-2}

::: {.card .card-lg .card-interactive .is-blue}

::: {.card-body .card-body-lg}

<div class="icon-badge icon-badge-blue">
  <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
</div>

### Dr. Jason S. Tsukahara, Ph.D.

::: {style="color: var(--color-secondary); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; margin-top: -.5rem;"}
Principal Investigator
:::

**Email**: jason.tsukahara@miami.edu <a onclick="copyEmail(this); return false;" data-copy="jason.tsukahara@miami.edu" title="Copy email" class="copy-email-link"><i class="bi bi-copy"></i></a>

::: {style="line-height: 0.5;"}
**Office**: building, room number

**Office Phone**: office phone here

**Mailing Address**: address here
:::

[jasontsukahara.com Website](https://www.jasontsukahara.com) <span>↗</span>

:::

:::

::: {.card .card-lg .card-interactive .is-green}

::: {.card-body .card-body-lg}

<div class="icon-badge icon-badge-green">
  <i class="bi bi-people"></i>
</div>

### Contact the Lab

::: {style="color: var(--color-secondary); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; margin-top: -.5rem;"}
General Inquiries
:::

**Email**: jason.tsukahara@miami.edu <a onclick="copyEmail(this); return false;" data-copy="jason.tsukahara@miami.edu" title="Copy email" class="copy-email-link"><i class="bi bi-copy"></i></a>

::: {style="line-height: 0.5;"}
**Lab Location:** building, room number

**Lab Phone**: office phone here

**Mailing Address**: address here
:::

:::

:::

:::

:::

::: {.section-shell}

::: {.grid-2}

::: {.card .card-lg .card-interactive .is-blue}

::: {.card-body .card-body-lg}

<div class="icon-badge icon-badge-blue">
  <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
</div>

### Join the Lab

::: {style="color: var(--color-secondary); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; margin-top: -.5rem;"}
Interested in joining the CALM Lab?
:::

::: {style="line-height: 0.5; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
We are currently recruiting for:

- Undergraduate Research Assistant
:::

**Email**: jason.tsukahara@miami.edu <a onclick="copyEmail(this); return false;" data-copy="jason.tsukahara@miami.edu" title="Copy email" class="copy-email-link"><i class="bi bi-copy"></i></a>

Check out our [Projects](projects/index.qmd) to learn more about our research, and feel free to reach out with any questions or to express interest in joining the lab!

:::

:::



:::

:::
